Cost Reduction Idea: Replace the Thinsulate Acoustic Insulation used within the Dashboard and Control Panel for NVH restriction within MGI with Noiselite PP-PET Insulation as used in KIA
Estimated Cost Savings:
The evaluation is done before teardown, the values will change after the costing,
1. The cost of the Thinsulate per square meter - INR 204
2. The cost of Noiselite per square meter - INR 155.49
3. The surface area of the control panel thinsulate - 0.226m2
4. The current cost = INR 46.10
5. The estimated cost after using noiselite instead = INR 35.14
6. Total cost saved on both LH and RH sides = 46.10 - 35.14 = 10.96*2 (LH & RH) = INR 21.92
7. The surface area of the dashboard panel thinsulate - 0.193m2
8. The current cost = INR 39.37
9. The estimated cost after using noiselite instead = INR 30
10. Total cost saved = 39.37 - 30 = INR 9.37

11. The total cost savings = 21.92 + 9.37 = INR 31.29
12. The total weight savings = Nil
Proposal: Replace the Thinsulate Acoustic Insulation used within the Dashboard and Control Panel for NVH restriction within MGI with Noiselite PP-PET Insulation as used in KIA
